audio.transcript: Today's AI engineering briefing. Item 1: Show HN: Oodle.ai – $10 per million agent traces. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 2: Show HN: Hiver – Chrome DevTools for Agents. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 3: Show HN: Low-latency local LLM runner via OpenJDK Panama FFM (Java 22). Relevant to Inference Internals & Performance. Matched Inference Internals & Performance on: latency. Read it through that lens. Item 4: Oya – Keep tool outputs away from the LLM to cut tokens and stop injection. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. No strong keyword match; defaulted to foundations. Read it through that lens. Item 5: Show HN: I built a smart proxy so your coding agent can run loose. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 6: Show HN: Cruxible – Terraform-like ontology config to governed state for agents. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens.
